titleStmt.title: SII 37.563: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 563. (A.R. No. B 135 of 1943-44.) Pedda-Nāgapūṇḍi, Chandragiri Taluk, Chittoor District.

summary.p: West wall of central shrine in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1638, Drumukhi, Āsvīja śu. 10, corresponding to 1716 A.D., September 15, Saturday.
It registers gift of six sites in the agrahāram Peda-Nāgapūḍi by Chilaṁpāṭi Akkappanāyani [Rū] Pālanāyini Nāgapa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varṣaṁbulu 1638 Agunēṭi durmukhi nāma saṁvatsaraṁ Āśvīja śu 10 lu [.] cilaṁpāṭi Akkappanāyani rūpālanāya nāgapa yiccina Agrahāraṁ māyillu bhēṭi Ayina pedanāgapūḍilō Āru kṣētrālku paddenimidi A
ḍugula lōpalānu muppaiĀru kāḍlunnu muppai reṁḍu Aḍugulakulōnu mūḍuvēla guṭṭalalōnunnu khaṁḍana cēsiyiccināraṁ dīni dānapatrālu yiccina bharatani Ādhāraṁ Anubhaviṁccagalavāru yī dharmaṁ putra pautra pāraṁparyaṁgā naḍpiṁcagalavārū dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvarga mavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ yi dharmānaku yevaru Ā cēśina caṁpina pāpāna
Digital edition of SII 37.563 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
